title: Strategic Resilience and India’s Energy Security Amidst West Asia Volatility
description: In Short: The resurgence of geopolitical conflict in the Middle East, punctuated by disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz, has exposed the structural vulnerabilities inherent in India’s energy supply chains. With significant volumes of crude oil, liquefied natural gas (LNG), […] The post Strategic Resilience and India’s Energy Security Amidst West Asia Volatility appeared first on Centre for Public Policy Research (CPPR).
